headline: Why The Narrative Around Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Is Shifting After Recent Analyst And News Updates
summary: Intercontinental Exchange has seen its fair value estimate nudged to US$197.21 from US$196.57, a small but telling adjustment to the anchor price target. Recent research activity, including both price target increases and trims, as well as at least one rating upgrade, shows analysts reassessing where the shares should trade and how much to pay for the company’s earnings power. Read on to see how to track these shifting targets and use them to follow the evolving narrative around the...
